title: `help synth_xilinx` segfaults
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

With Yosys 7939727d, run `help synth_xilinx`

## Expected behavior

The command doesn't crash.

## Actual behavior

```
The following commands are executed by this synthesis command:

    begin:
        read_verilog -lib +/xilinx/cells_sim.v
        read_verilog -lib +/xilinx/cells_xtra.v
        hierarchy -check -auto-top

    prepare:
        proc
        flatten    (with '-flatten')
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

GDB states the line causing the crash is
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/7939727d14f44b5d56ca3806d0907e9fceea2882/techlibs/xilinx/synth_xilinx.cc#L319
which makes sense as there *is* no active design in this context.
code_blocks:
The following commands are executed by this synthesis command:

    begin:
        read_verilog -lib +/xilinx/cells_sim.v
        read_verilog -lib +/xilinx/cells_xtra.v
        hierarchy -check -auto-top

    prepare:
        proc
        flatten    (with '-flatten')
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
